seoTitle: NHCS Calendar 2025-2026: Dates, Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: View the New Hanover County Schools 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 26 first day, Jun 5 last day, holidays, breaks, teacher workdays, and printable PDF.
calendarNotes: This page covers the NHCS traditional student calendar. Routine staff-only labels are simplified unless they affect student attendance.

alternateCalendars.label: 2025-2026 Isaac Bear Early College High School
2025-2026 Wilmington Early College High School and Southeast Area Technical High School

calendarFaqs.q: When does NHCS start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: New Hanover County Schools traditional-calendar students start school on Tuesday, August 26, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is NHCS Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break on the NHCS 2025-2026 traditional calendar runs Friday, April 3 through Friday, April 10, 2026. Students return Monday, April 13, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: Does NHCS have a half day in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The 2025-2026 New Hanover County Schools traditional calendar lists June 5, 2026 as the last day and a half day for students.

customSections.label: Important NHCS Dates Parents Search For
customSections.content: These are the traditional-calendar dates most families check first when planning the 2025-2026 school year.

groups.label: Quick answers
items: First day of school: Tuesday, August 26, 2025.
Winter Break ends Friday, January 2, 2026, and students return Monday, January 5, 2026.
Spring Break runs Friday, April 3 through Friday, April 10, 2026.
The final student day is Friday, June 5, 2026, and the traditional calendar marks it as a half day.

yearNumbers.label: Additional No-School Weekdays
yearNumbers.detail: Includes Labor Day, October 2 Designated Teacher Workday and Parent Conferences, October 31 Designated Teacher Workday, Martin Luther King Jr. Day, January 20 Designated Teacher Workday, February 9 Undesignated Teacher Workday, March 3 Election Day / Undesignated Teacher Workday, May 4 Designated Teacher Workday, and Memorial Day. Break periods and the last-day half day are excluded.

yearNumbers.label: Student Half Days
yearNumbers.detail: The traditional calendar marks June 5 as the last day and a half day for students.
